prose:
The frontier orbitals for pyridine were calculated using density functional theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (PySCF). This was performed in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1, at the geometry provided in `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz` — used as-is without further optimization.

SCF computations converged cleanly in 10 cycles. The final total energy was −6758.72 eV (≈ −248.38 Hartree), and the HOMO and LUMO orbital energies are −7.2526 eV and −1.1128 eV, respectively. The resulting HOMO–LUMO gap is **6.1398 eV**. No warnings were reported during the calculation. Engine resolve: trustworthy (mechanical integrity checks passed).

Command issued: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --solvent none --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out frontier_orbitals_pyridine_b3lyp.json`. Output JSON captured at: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpdbkw_a57/live.json`.
